DeliveredScope: Shared portable Compose core for SQL Server 2019, 2022, and 2025
Independent per-version Compose profiles and default host ports
Separate Docker and Podman resource-limit overrides
Runtime health check that executes a SQL query
Interactive and non-interactive PowerShell 7 Preflight entrypoint
Docker or Podman runtime and Compose capability detection
SQL Server version, host-port, memory, path, image, EULA, and secret-policy checks
Generic scope-conflict detection without creating or changing runtime resources
Structured READY or PREFLIGHT_FAILED result with reason codes
Synthetic positive and negative Preflight contract tests
OpenScope: Lifecycle execution and generated local state
Start, Stop, Restart, Reset, Status, Down, and Destroy
ExternalEvidenceRequired: Native x86-64 Linux Docker Preflight against an installed runtime
Native x86-64 Linux Podman Preflight against an installed runtime
Registry and SQL Server image availability checks
